findings.reason: declared Level 1 consistent with input observability
only 1 comparable(s) (< 3) for a market-approach mark

not_evaluable.why: uncertainty range only required for Level 3 (declared 1)

review_considerations: a documented, approved methodology/policy exception may be on file
a thin- or inactive-market instrument where comparables are legitimately scarce
an adjustment magnitude that is immaterial to the position and portfolio
an input refreshed after this extract — confirm the latest source date
an IPV variance within an approved tolerance band for this asset class
an override pre-approved under a standing delegated authority
disclaimer: Valuation review evidence only; not a valuation sign-off, override approval, or fair-value determination. No value has been posted or approved.
narrative: Valuation review of instrument EQ-LISTED-101 (Level 1, market approach) for as-of 2026-07-15 raised 2 findings, both medium severity: one stale input (last_price sourced 75 days before as-of) and only 1 comparable against the configured minimum of 3. This deployment runs a tightened config for the equity desk (escalate_finding_count = 2), so two fired findings meet the escalation threshold. Suggested disposition: Escalate to the responsible product-control reviewer. Every finding cites the specific valuation-record evidence behind it. This output is valuation-review evidence only; it is not a valuation sign-off, override approval, or fair-value determination, and no value has been posted or approved. Weigh the review considerations before reaching any conclusion.
